allow: PowerShell(cd "D:\\code\\2501060334-30\\frontend" ; $proc = Start-Process pnpm -ArgumentList "dev" -NoNewWindow -PassThru ; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10 ; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5173" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5 ; Write-Output "Frontend OK: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "Frontend: $_" } ; $proc.Kill\(\))

PowerShell($body = '{"username":"testhr","password":"test123","role":"hr"}'; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/register" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json; charset=utf-8"; "Register HR: code=$\($r.code\) msg=$\($r.message\)")

PowerShell($loginBody = '{"username":"testhr","password":"test123"}'; $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $loginBody -ContentType "application/json; charset=utf-8"; $hrToken = $login.data.token; $headers = @{Authorization="Bearer $hrToken"; "Content-Type"="application/json; charset=utf-8"}; $jobBody = '{"title":"全栈工程师\(test\)","salaryText":"20K-35K","requirements":"精通Vue3+SpringBoot, 5年以上全栈经验","deadline":"2026-12-31 23:59:59"}'; $job = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/jobs" -Method POST -Body $jobBody -Headers $headers; "CreateJob: code=$\($job.code\) msg=$\($job.message\)")

PowerShell($loginBody = '{"username":"testhr","password":"test123"}'; $login = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $loginBody -ContentType "application/json; charset=utf-8"; "Login OK: code=$\($login.code\)"; "Role from response: $\($login.data.role\)"; "UserId from response: $\($login.data.userId\)"; $token = $login.data.token; $headers = @{Authorization="Bearer $token"; "Content-Type"="application/json"}; $jobBody = '{"title":"全栈工程师\(test\)","salaryText":"20K-35K","requirements":"精通Vue3+SpringBoot, 5年以上全栈经验","deadline":"2026-12-31 23:59:59"}'; try { $job = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/jobs" -Method POST -Body $jobBody -Headers $headers; "CreateJob: code=$\($job.code\) msg=$\($job.message\)" } catch { "CreateJob FAIL: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($token = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"hr01","password":"test123"}'\).data.token; Write-Host "Token: $\($token.Substring\(0,30\)\)..."; $result = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/applications?scope=myJobs&pageNum=1&pageSize=200" -Method GET -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; $result.data.records | ForEach-Object { [PSCustomObject]@{ id=$_.id; job_id=$_.job_id; user_id=$_.user_id; status=$_.status } } | Format-Table)

PowerShell($token = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"hr01","password":"test123"}'\).data.token; $result = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/statistics/funnel" -Method GET -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; Write-Host "Funnel data:"; $result.data | ForEach-Object { Write-Host "  $\($_.status\): $\($_.count\)" })

PowerShell($token = \(Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"username":"hr01","password":"test123"}'\).data.token; $result = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/applications?scope=myJobs&pageNum=1&pageSize=200" -Method GET -Headers @{Authorization="Bearer $token"}; Write-Host "Code: $\($result.code\)"; Write-Host "Has records: $\($result.data.records -ne $null\)"; Write-Host "Records count: $\($result.data.records.Count\)"; Write-Host "First record keys: $\($result.data.records[0].Keys -join ','\)")
